You were born to be great, you were. That's why you're here. I firmly believe that. Anyone who took the time to... Okay, yeah, it's only $14 a month, right? It's not a lot, but that's not the point. It's you invested your time. You're going at it. That tells me something. That tells me that your table, that you deserve greatness. When I was in Moscow, last week I spoke to 32,000 people. And sometimes, you know, you tell a funny f***ing guy. I ain't doing that, right? And they tell a joke and they just look at you. It's the translation kind of misses, right? You know, but there's one thing I said to them that almost brought tears to a lot of their eyes. Very profound. And when I said to them, I said, guys, I was going through, you know, there's reasons and results people. People who have all the reasons why they can't get ahead. There's f***ing reason people. Quack, quack. They talk to the world, right? And I said, and then you have results people. People who just get f***ing done. They find a way or they make a way. And they say the good news is there's not one duck in this entire room. And they looked around like, you know why I know that? You know, like, you know why in Russian, right? I say because ducks don't come to these rooms. A duck will never walk into my seminar because, you know, the ability I have threatens their beliefs about me, yacht pretty and average, even while we can self pity and spreading that misery around. They don't want to be around a guy like me. They don't want to be around all the positive people who want to spread positivity and, you know, to make massive welcome success the norm bearer. They don't want that. They won't come to those rooms. So I said, this other duck was 31 of 32,000 people at this event. It was a massive stage. I was like, f***ing, I thought like, f***, I'm here to see the wizard. F***, right? All right, it's huge. And then I said to them, I said, guys, there's not one duck in this room. I know that, but I'll tell you what there are. There's a whole bunch of eagles here that have had their wings clipped. You've had your wings clipped. Something happened, whether it was your fault or not your fault. You know, sometimes you're just walking down the street. You're doing everything right. You're working hard. You're going at things exactly the way you should. And bam, you get hit between the arms with a lump of shit. That's why we have bumper sticks that say, shit happens. We live in a world where shit happens, right? And not always your fault. Sometimes it's your fault. In fact, many often you do bring a shit on yourself. But the point is, is that that's life. And when that lump of shit hits you between the eyes, it's at that moment when we tend to start to develop limiting beliefs about ourselves. Because things are going terrible. Oh my God, what did I do? It's my fault. Maybe I'm not meant for success. What was me? Maybe I should just get real with myself. What was I? I think I could have all of that and be so respected and loved. And had such a beautiful, oh come on, I'm not worthy of that. And you start fucking inserting limiting beliefs in yourself. You take away the whole meaning from the experience. So what happens is that when you're in that spot and you get hit with that ramp, that negative happening, whoop, knocks you out, right, to upends you, right? Eagles start thinking like ducks. They get knocked out, right? And they get sidetracked and they start acting. They do duck-like actions. But they're still the Eagles. But they start acting like ducks. They start having that impossibility notion. They start focusing on what's wrong in their life and not what's right in their life. They start focusing on all the reasons why they can't succeed. Rather than knowing the truth, which is if they want to work really, really hard and embrace the right strategies and not all the right people, you can succeed no matter what you do. But Eagles act like ducks. And what I said to them is that here's the deal, guys. I'm here to give you your wings back. I'm going to give you your wings back so you can soar again. And the whole room went crazy, right? So you have people that I can see the emotion was really hard because it's a truth. It's a truthful statement. We live in what should happens. And I'm sure you've been on the ass end of this equation yourself. And what happens is you're capable of greatness. You deserve greatness. And you're an eagle for sure. That's why you're in this program. But just like a duck. Well, I'm an expert at giving people their wings back. And that's my goal for you for the rest of 2018. So you can sort of success. Now, the second part of that equation was something else I said to them. And you probably heard me mention this before. I started by seven percent, guys. I've been around the block eight billion times. I've heard every stupid line uttered by a so-called self-development expert who doesn't know the first frickin' thing about self-development. You don't know what they read in the book. I said, but of all the stupid statements that I've heard uttered in my years in this industry by people who are never really in the real world making money, the most destructive one of all is I want you to leap and grow wings on the way down. So that's a complete and utter nonsense. Because if you leap and try to grow your wings, you'll smash into the f***ing earth. When you're down there bluttered and bad, and people are basically pissing on you, that's when you deform all your limiting beliefs. That's the moment when it happens, when you're feeling terrible. Everyone's laughing at you and your people are like, you see, I told you so, especially in places like Australia, where you have that tall poppy syndrome, and when you take a full f***ing marble in it. So depending on where you live, it's going to be even worse. The point is, is in those moments in life that we've developed these toxic limiting beliefs that end up plaguing us for the rest of our lives, unless we root them out. You get it? Unless you actively root out these limiting beliefs and replace them with an empowering belief that supports your largest sore, then you're going to be held down by that lowest level, limiting belief, bottom line. So I could teach you the straight line from today to tomorrow. I could teach you how to get massive leads online, offline. I could teach you every last rule of entrepreneurship, but you know what? You won't execute, you won't act on it, because it's not your identity of who you think you are. Get that? If it's not congruent with who you think you are, when you're closureized and say, is that really me? Can I really see myself? Do I really? And you're like, nah, let me tell you something guys. When I close my eyes, I'm like, why am I not even further along? I really believe I should be further along. I'm very confident. And I want you to have that same confidence. And by the way, if you don't have it right now, that's okay. You're being honest. But I want you to draw it from me. That's why I'm in your ear every single day with daily motivations. I'm in there just to transfer my certainty about myself and my certainty for you that if you have someone like me advising you and pushing you to success, that we will shift your identity, we will. You will start saying, I'm the shit. I'm Kate Gulligray's. And when you have that belief, when you feel that way, we'll guess what happens. Who's the first person you have to sell in this world before you sell anybody else? Who? Yourself.
